title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Kalyan Jewellers

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Kalyan Jewellers
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Kalyan Jewellers in Howrah is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Kalyan Jewellers:
Kalyan Jewellers is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Planogram

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kalyan Jewellers!
